name: intake-manual
purpose: CLI entry point for manually recording a single technical debt item into MASTER_DEBT.jsonl; validates severity/category/effort via audit-schema, generates content hash, deduplicates, assigns DEBT-XXXX ID, and triggers generate-views.
notes: Entry point. Writes to MASTER_DEBT.jsonl + raw/deduped.jsonl via appendMasterDebtSync. Calls generate-views.js post-write. Schema values loaded from scripts/config/audit-schema.json at runtime.

name: intake-audit
purpose: Batch intake of audit-generated JSONL findings (TDMS, Doc Standards, or Enhancement Audit format) into MASTER_DEBT.jsonl; auto-detects and maps 3 input formats, assigns DEBT IDs, deduplicates, then runs the full post-intake pipeline (dedup, views, roadmap-refs).
notes: Entry point. Handles 3 input formats: TDMS (native), Doc Standards, Enhancement Audit. Field mapping: fingerprint->source_id, files[]->file, why_it_matters->description, suggested_fix->recommendation, acceptance_tests->evidence, confidence->logged. Impact->Severity: I0=S1,I1=S2,I2=S2,I3=S3. Post-intake pipeline: dedup-multi-pass -> generate-views -> assign-roadmap-refs.

name: intake-pr-deferred
purpose: Records a single technical debt item deferred from a PR review; requires --pr number, creates DEBT entry with source_pr linkage, then regenerates views.
notes: Entry point. Sets source_id='pr-deferred:UUID', source_file='PR #N', type='tech-debt'. Called by escalate-deferred.js indirectly.

name: ingest-cleaned-intake
purpose: Ingests pre-cleaned JSONL (scattered-intake-cleaned.jsonl, with content_hash already set) into MASTER_DEBT.jsonl; assigns DEBT IDs continuing from max existing, deduplicates by content_hash.
notes: Entry point. Reads docs/technical-debt/raw/scattered-intake-cleaned.jsonl. Uses appendMasterDebtSync to write both MASTER and deduped. Step 0h of resolution plan. Strips cleaning_disposition field on output items.

name: extract-audits
purpose: Extracts findings from docs/audits/**/*.jsonl (excluding FALSE_POSITIVES.jsonl) and normalizes them to TDMS raw format, outputting docs/technical-debt/raw/audits.jsonl.
notes: Entry point (extraction layer). Reads docs/audits/**/*.jsonl. Source ID derived from item.id/canonical_id/master_id/original_id/finding_id or base64url hash of title:file:line. Handles multiple audit formats: single-session (CODE-*, SEC-*), multi-AI, canonical MASTER_FINDINGS (CANON-*).

name: extract-reviews
purpose: Extracts findings from docs/reviews/**/*.jsonl and docs/aggregation/*.jsonl (canonical CANON-* and MASTER_ISSUE_LIST files) to docs/technical-debt/raw/reviews.jsonl.
notes: Entry point (extraction layer). Preserves extra review fields: pr_bucket, consensus_score, dependencies, roadmap_status. Excludes dedup-log.jsonl and crossref-log.jsonl from aggregation dir.

name: extract-audit-reports
purpose: One-shot migration: extracts actionable findings from 17 Dec 2025 markdown audit reports in docs/archive/2025-dec-reports/ using 3 strategies (table parsing, section headings, actionable bullets).
notes: One-shot migration script (Step 0b). Source-specific: tied to docs/archive/2025-dec-reports/ and REPORT_CONFIG map of 17 specific SoNash report filenames. Three extraction strategies: (1) markdown table parser, (2) numbered/lettered H2-H5 sections, (3) actionable bullet points. Default --dry-run; needs --write to actually write. Not portable without replacing REPORT_CONFIG entirely.

name: extract-scattered-debt
purpose: Scans source directories for TODO/FIXME/HACK/XXX/WORKAROUND code comments and extracts them as TDMS JSONL items, with false-positive detection for variable names and quoted examples.
notes: Step 0a. SCAN_DIRS is SoNash-specific (src,app,components,lib,hooks,types,scripts,.claude/hooks,functions/src). Generic algorithm (block-comment state tracking, false-positive detection, content hash) is portable; SCAN_DIRS + SCAN_EXTENSIONS need reconfiguration. Severity map: TODO=S3, FIXME/HACK/XXX/WORKAROUND=S2. Default --dry-run; needs --write.

name: extract-context-debt
purpose: Extracts Gap: items and FINDING-* entries from .claude/state/agent-research-results.md and .claude/state/system-test-gap-analysis-pass2.md into TDMS JSONL.
notes: Step 0f. Hardcoded to specific SoNash state files (agent-research-results.md, system-test-gap-analysis-pass2.md). SOURCE_FILES list is SoNash-specific. General extraction pattern (Gap: and FINDING-* parsing) could be made generic. Default --dry-run; needs --write.

name: extract-roadmap-debt
purpose: Parses ROADMAP.md checkbox items, classifies them as debt vs feature using keyword scoring, and extracts debt items to scattered-intake.jsonl.
notes: Step 0c. Debt vs feature classification uses keyword weight scoring (debt keywords: fix,refactor,cleanup,tech-debt,test-coverage,security,etc.; feature keywords: dashboard,page,user-facing,etc.). Skips DEBT-XXXX and CANON-XXXX already-tracked items. Default --dry-run; needs --write. ROADMAP.md path is project-specific.

name: normalize-all
purpose: Merges all raw JSONL extractions from docs/technical-debt/raw/*.jsonl, applies final schema normalization (enum enforcement, path normalization, hash generation), outputs normalized-all.jsonl.
notes: Normalization layer. Reads raw/*.jsonl (excludes normalized-all.jsonl). Schema enforcement via audit-schema.json config (VALID_CATEGORIES, VALID_SEVERITIES, VALID_TYPES, VALID_STATUSES, VALID_EFFORTS). Preserves optional metadata: original_id, rule, sonar_key, evidence, sources, merged_from, pr_bucket, consensus_score, dependencies, roadmap_status. Adds updated timestamp.

name: dedup-multi-pass
purpose: 6-pass deduplication engine for TDMS: parametric (numbers stripped), exact hash, near match (file+line±5+title>80%), semantic (file+title>90%), cross-source SonarCloud/audit correlation, systemic pattern annotation.
notes: Core dedup engine. Pass 5 is purely annotation (no removal) — marks items with cluster_id/cluster_count/cluster_primary when same title appears in >=3 files. Cross-source pass has hardcoded SonarCloud rule->category mappings (SONAR_TO_CATEGORY). S0/S1 parametric matches flagged for review instead of auto-merged. Uses Levenshtein similarity. Output: deduped.jsonl + dedup-log.jsonl + review-needed.jsonl.

name: consolidate-all
purpose: Master orchestrator pipeline: runs extract-audits, extract-reviews, normalize-all, dedup-multi-pass, generate-views (--ingest) in sequence; non-required extract-sonarcloud.js step deprecated.
notes: Top-level pipeline entry point. extract-sonarcloud.js step is DEPRECATED — replaced by sync-sonarcloud.js for live API sync. 5 required steps; step 1 (sonarcloud extract) is non-required and auto-skipped if script absent.

name: generate-views
purpose: Generates markdown views from MASTER_DEBT.jsonl (read-only mode) or from deduped.jsonl with DEBT ID assignment and MASTER append (--ingest mode); outputs INDEX.md, 4 view files, and LEGACY_ID_MAPPING.json.
notes: Central view generator. Outputs: INDEX.md, views/by-severity.md, views/by-category.md, views/by-status.md, views/verification-queue.md, LEGACY_ID_MAPPING.json. --ingest mode also writes to MASTER_DEBT.jsonl. Called from intake-manual, intake-audit, intake-pr-deferred, sync-sonarcloud, assign-roadmap-refs, resolve-item, resolve-bulk.

name: generate-metrics
purpose: Generates METRICS.md and metrics.json from MASTER_DEBT.jsonl for dashboard integration; tracks open/resolved counts by severity, category, effort, and trend over time.
notes: Dashboard integration script. Outputs: METRICS.md + metrics.json (machine-readable for SoNash dev dashboard). Writes metrics-log.jsonl for trend tracking. Should run at session-end/session-start via hook. Dashboard coupling is SoNash-specific.

name: sync-sonarcloud
purpose: Live bidirectional sync with SonarCloud API: fetches issues+hotspots, deduplicates against MASTER_DEBT.jsonl, assigns DEBT IDs; --resolve mode detects stale items (no longer in SonarCloud) and marks them RESOLVED; --full does both.
notes: NOT portable: direct SonarCloud API integration, org/project keys are SoNash-specific. Severity mapping: BLOCKER/CRITICAL=S0, MAJOR=S1, MINOR=S2, INFO=S3. Post-intake correction: cognitive complexity BLOCKERs downgraded to S1. Operator PII pseudonymized via SHA-256 hash of os.userInfo().username. Reads sonar-project.properties for org/project defaults. Hotspot severity from vulnerabilityProbability: HIGH=S0, MEDIUM=S1, LOW=S2.

name: sync-deduped
purpose: Propagates severity and status changes made in MASTER_DEBT.jsonl back into deduped.jsonl, preventing generate-views --ingest from reverting manual edits.
notes: Maintenance script addressing the bidirectional-write tension: generate-views reads deduped.jsonl and overwrites MASTER; if MASTER is edited directly, changes are lost on next --ingest. --apply writes changes; --dry-run (default) exits 1 if diffs found. JSON output mode for machine consumption. Matches by content_hash.

name: sync-roadmap-refs
purpose: Validates DEBT-XXXX references in ROADMAP.md and ROADMAP_FUTURE.md against MASTER_DEBT.jsonl; reports orphaned IDs that don't exist in master.
notes: UNIQUE: This is the ONLY ESM file in scripts/debt/ — uses import/export syntax with createRequire workaround for the CJS parse-jsonl-line lib. All other 27 files are CJS (require). Checks ROADMAP.md and ROADMAP_FUTURE.md for DEBT-XXXX ID references. --check-only mode for CI use.

name: assign-roadmap-refs
purpose: Bulk-assigns roadmap_ref to MASTER_DEBT.jsonl items based on category and file path mapping to SoNash roadmap tracks (Track-S, Track-P, Track-D, Track-E, Track-T, M2.1, M2.2, M2.3-REF, M1.5).
notes: NOT portable: Track-S/Track-P/Track-D/Track-E/Track-T/M2.1/M2.2/M2.3-REF/M1.5 are SoNash roadmap tracks. Algorithm (category+filepath -> track assignment) is generic; the track naming schema is project-specific. Called by intake-audit.js as part of post-intake pipeline. Creates MASTER_DEBT.jsonl.bak backup.

name: reconcile-roadmap
purpose: Replaces CANON-XXXX references in ROADMAP.md with DEBT-XXXX IDs using LEGACY_ID_MAPPING.json; one-shot migration step (Step 9 of resolution plan).
notes: Migration script. SoNash-specific: ROADMAP.md path, CANON-XXXX ID scheme, LEGACY_ID_MAPPING.json. Creates ROADMAP.md.bak backup. Default dry-run; --write to apply.

name: resolve-item
purpose: Marks a single DEBT-XXXX item as RESOLVED (with optional PR number) or FALSE_POSITIVE (with required reason); writes atomically with rollback on failure; regenerates views.
notes: Entry point. FALSE_POSITIVE items are removed from MASTER and appended to FALSE_POSITIVES.jsonl. Uses writeMasterDebtSync (full rewrite). Logs to resolution-log.jsonl. Regenerates views via generate-views.js.

name: resolve-bulk
purpose: Bulk-resolves multiple DEBT-XXXX items from CLI args or a file of IDs; --eligible-only mode restricts to VERIFIED/IN_PROGRESS/TRIAGED statuses for CI automation; --output-json for machine consumption.
notes: Entry point. Eligible statuses for CI automation: VERIFIED, IN_PROGRESS, TRIAGED. Uses atomic write+rename pattern (safeRenameSync). streamLinesSync for memory-efficient large file reading. --output-json path for CI JSON consumption.

name: verify-resolutions
purpose: Audits MASTER_DEBT.jsonl item statuses: promotes NEW items to VERIFIED (if file exists), audits RESOLVED items (confirms or flags as possibly unresolved), audits FALSE_POSITIVE items (confirms or flags). Steps 3+4+5 combined.
notes: Verification script. Outputs resolution-audit-report.json. Default --dry-run; --write to apply. Keyword-based verification using STOP_WORDS set for title token extraction. Combined implementation of Steps 3, 4, 5 of resolution plan.

name: process-review-needed
purpose: Analyzes review-needed.jsonl (S0/S1 items flagged by parametric dedup for manual review) and resolves pairs into: already-merged, true-duplicates, distinct-instances, or new items needing intake.
notes: Step 0e. Reads review-needed.jsonl (output of dedup-multi-pass pass 0). Default --dry-run; --write to apply. Part of the triage layer between dedup and master ingest.

name: clean-intake
purpose: 4-phase intake cleaner: deduplication (Dice coefficient similarity), false positive detection, completed work detection, item verification; transforms scattered-intake.jsonl to scattered-intake-cleaned.jsonl.
notes: Step 0h. Uses Dice coefficient bigram similarity (not Levenshtein). Cleaning phases: (1) hash dedup, (2) false positive detection, (3) completed work detection, (4) item verification. Adds cleaning_disposition field; ingest-cleaned-intake.js strips it on write.

name: escalate-deferred
purpose: Auto-escalates PR review items deferred >= threshold (default 2) times to S1 DEBT entries via intake-pr-deferred.js; reads data/ecosystem-v2/deferred-items.jsonl (SoNash product state file).
notes: NOT portable: reads data/ecosystem-v2/deferred-items.jsonl which is a SoNash product state file. review_id format 'rev-NNN' is SoNash-specific. Exports escalateDeferred/classifyCategory/extractPrNumber for testability. Has module.exports (CJS). Threshold default=2.

name: check-phase-status
purpose: Checks TDMS implementation phase completion by reading PHASE_N_AUDIT.md files in docs/technical-debt/; reports PASS/FAIL status for 17 TDMS phases.
notes: NOT portable: hardcoded 17-phase TDMS implementation checklist specific to SoNash TDMS rollout. PHASE list includes SoNash-specific phase names (Dev dashboard, Verification batches, PR template, etc.). UNIQUE: ESM module (import/export syntax, no .mjs extension). One of only 2 ESM files in scripts/debt/.

name: validate-schema
purpose: Validates any JSONL file (default: MASTER_DEBT.jsonl) against TDMS schema; checks required fields, enum values, file path validity, S0/S1 severity requiring verification_steps; --strict mode fails on warnings.
notes: Validation utility. Schema sourced from audit-schema.json (REQUIRED_FIELDS, VALID_CATEGORIES, VALID_SEVERITIES, VALID_TYPES, VALID_STATUSES, VALID_EFFORTS). Exit codes: 0=valid, 1=validation errors, 2=file/parse error. --staged-only flag for pre-commit integration. --strict fails on warnings (e.g. missing line numbers, placeholder file paths).
